summary: Iteration 8 runtime resilience verified: safeArray guards, hardened Sanity portfolio normalizers, global ErrorBoundary, and docs section 4.4 all confirmed. Production build passes (exit 0). Browser smoke tests on /portfolio and /services?lang=fr succeed with no white screen and no console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: PortfolioPreview, PortfolioPage, ServicesPage, ServicesGrid, BlogPage all wrap setState with safeArray(r?.data) and have .catch(() => setX([])) — confirmed no raw setItems(r.data).

portfolio.js normalizePortfolio() has Array.isArray guards for gallery/services/tools/kpis. fetchPortfolioList/fetchFeaturedPortfolio wrap results in Array.isArray check and try/catch returning [] — confirmed.

PortfolioDetailPage.jsx: MetaBlock services uses `Array.isArray(item.services) && item.services.length > 0` guard before slice/join. BentoGallery does `const list = Array.isArray(images) ? images : []` before .map — confirmed.

ErrorBoundary class component present with getDerivedStateFromError + componentDidCatch + Retry/Back home fallback (data-testid=error-boundary, error-retry-button, error-home-button). App.js wraps entire router tree with <ErrorBoundary> inside <BrowserRouter> — confirmed.
SETUP_GUIDE.md line 185 has section '### 4.4 Autoriser votre domaine Vercel dans Sanity (CORS)' with step-by-step CORS setup — confirmed.
npm/yarn build exit 0. Only non-blocking Tailwind ambiguity warnings (ease-[cubic-bezier(...)]) — cosmetic, unrelated to this iteration.
Browser smoke: /portfolio renders 'Impactful brands made undeniable.' heading, 6 filter buttons, Akya Dance card, no error-boundary, no console errors. /services?lang=fr renders 12 service rows.

success_rate.backend: N/A (not tested this iteration - frontend runtime resilience focus)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 focused on Vercel white-screen/CORS resilience. All defensive .map guards + ErrorBoundary + CORS docs verified. Next iteration should retest if user reports another crash on Vercel after adding the Vercel URL in Sanity CORS dashboard.
rca of the issue: White screen on Vercel was caused by unguarded .map() on non-array API responses when Sanity CORS blocked the request (returned undefined/error). Mitigated by safeArray() wrapper on all setState calls, Array.isArray guards in portfolio normalize/fetch, and global ErrorBoundary as last-line safety net. User must add Vercel domain to Sanity CORS origins per SETUP_GUIDE.md section 4.4.
